sections.description: Embeds a Propeller app in WordPress with short code [propeller_embed_switcher], and [propeller_embed] with cookie guidance, retry support , one-at-a-time dropdown switching, dynamic embed initialization, and self-hosted auto-updates.
sections.installation: Upload the ZIP in Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin. Activate it, then configure it under Settings → Propeller Embed.
sections.changelog:
= 1.3.9 =
* Added [propeller_embed_switcher] for true one-at-a-time iframe loading.
* Added dynamic re-initialization for embeds inserted after page load.
* Updated the bundled JSON manifest author and homepage fields.

= 1.3.8 =
* Added redundant instance fields in handshake init payload.
* Parent now accepts instanceId aliases in iframe messages for more resilient GTM integrations.
